cards.name: Slash
cards.description: A basic sword strike. Everyone knows this one.

cards.name: Block
cards.description: 2 temp HP. Absorbs the next hit.

cards.name: Mend
cards.description: Restore 3 HP. Good in a pinch.

cards.name: Cinder Strike
cards.description: A burning strike. ♠ enemies take ×1.5.

cards.name: Frost Shard
cards.description: A shard of ice. ♣ enemies take ×1.5.

cards.name: Arc Bolt
cards.description: A bolt of lightning. ♦ enemies take ×1.5.

cards.name: Embers
cards.description: 2 damage + burn (1 DOT). The damage keeps giving.

cards.name: Glacial Guard
cards.description: 3 temp HP. Solid frost defense.

cards.name: Thunder Clap
cards.description: 4 ♣ damage. Loud. Effective.

cards.name: Rummage
cards.description: Draw 1 extra card this combat.

cards.name: Bonepick
cards.description: A harvested bone used as a weapon. Biologically efficient.

cards.name: Grave Chill
cards.description: 3 ♠ damage + stun (1 turn). The cold settles in.

cards.name: Corpse Gas
cards.description: 2 ♣ damage + poison. Smells awful. Works great.

cards.name: Mold Web
cards.description: 4 def + root enemy (skip action). Good for emergencies.

cards.name: Rat Swarm
cards.description: 3 hits of 1 damage. Each hit triggers on-hit effects separately.

cards.name: Amber Lock
cards.description: Freeze enemy for 2 turns. Zero damage. Pure control.

cards.name: Dead Weight
cards.description: 6 damage. Slow swing, huge impact.

cards.name: Bone Shard
cards.description: 4 damage + bleed (1 DOT). Pierces light armor.

cards.name: Undying Will
cards.description: +5 HP (only if below half health). The will to survive.

cards.name: Crypt Shroud
cards.description: 5 def + regen (2 HP/turn × 2). Frost armor that heals.

cards.name: Slag Toss
cards.description: Hurl molten slag. 3 ♦ damage.

cards.name: Furnace Breath
cards.description: 4 ♦ damage + burn. The furnace doesn't stop.

cards.name: Iron Wall
cards.description: 4 temp HP. Riveted steel. Simple.

cards.name: Pressure Burst
cards.description: 5 ♣ damage. Pressurized steam explosion.

cards.name: Scrap Shield
cards.description: 6 def + reflect (1 dmg returned on hit). Forged from enemy scrap.

cards.name: Forge Strike
cards.description: 6 ♦ damage. Heavy hammer, hotter flame.

cards.name: Overclock
cards.description: Restore 2 energy immediately. Then do something else.

cards.name: Meltdown
cards.description: 8 ♦ damage + burn (2 stacks). The foundry goes critical.

cards.name: Rivet Shot
cards.description: 5 damage + stun (1 turn). A rivet, fired at high speed.

cards.name: Ember Ward
cards.description: 3 def + burn reflect (attackers take burn on hit).

cards.name: Cinder Bloom
cards.description: 3 dmg + burn, twice. Two applications of everything.

cards.name: Cryo Bolt
cards.description: 6 ♠ damage + stun. Deep-water cold.

cards.name: Shock Net
cards.description: 4 storm + shock (drain 1 enemy energy). Electric fishing.

cards.name: Deep Freeze
cards.description: 5 def + freeze enemy (1 turn). Both offensive and defensive.

cards.name: Bio Surge
cards.description: 3 storm + drain 1 energy. Bioluminescent discharge.

cards.name: Pressure Wave
cards.description: 5 damage. Concussive burst from depth charges.

cards.name: Brine Hex
cards.description: 3 frost + freeze for 2 turns. Salt and ice.

cards.name: Current Charge
cards.description: 6 ♣ damage. Costs 1 battery instead of energy. Lab equipment.

cards.name: Archivist's Copy
cards.description: Repeat the last card played, targeting this enemy.

cards.name: Cryo Cocoon
cards.description: 10 def + regen (3 HP/turn × 2). Encased in ice. Protected.

cards.name: Scale Coat
cards.description: 4 def + regen. Dragon scale armor. Tide Council standard issue.

cards.name: Tidal Surge
cards.description: 7 ♠ damage + stun. The tide doesn't ask permission.

cards.name: Dragon's Roar
cards.description: 9 ♦ damage. A frost faction card that uses fire. Dragons make their own rules.

cards.name: Sea Witch's Hex
cards.description: Drain 3 enemy energy + 5 ♣ damage. The hex compounds.

cards.name: Tide's Blessing
cards.description: +4 HP + draw 1 card. The council looks after its own.

cards.name: Forge Mastery
cards.description: 5 ♦ damage + 2 armor. Attack and defend simultaneously.

cards.name: Smelter's Fury
cards.description: 4 damage twice. Two swings from the forge hammer.

cards.name: Iron Resolve
cards.description: 7 temp HP. The foundry doesn't bend.

cards.name: Magma Core
cards.description: 10 flame + burn (3 stacks). The core breaches containment.

cards.name: Scrap Salvo
cards.description: Fire 3 chunks of scrap. 2 damage each.

cards.name: Signal Flare
cards.description: 3 ♣ damage + restore 1 energy. Efficient use of resources.

cards.name: Court Order
cards.description: All card costs reduced by 1 energy for 3 turns. The order is law.

cards.name: Thunder Protocol
cards.description: 8 ♣ damage + stun. The protocol authorizes lethal force.

cards.name: Brine Blade
cards.description: 4 ♠ damage + bleed. Salt in the wound is still water.

cards.name: Final Decree
cards.description: 14 ♣ damage. No appeal process.

cards.name: Elemental Echo
cards.description: 5 damage matching the element of the last card played.

cards.name: Blood Price
cards.description: 9 damage. Costs 3 HP instead of energy. Pay with what you have.

cards.name: Gleaner's Gambit
cards.description: Next card played deals double damage.

cards.name: Chain Fire
cards.description: 4 damage + burn ×2, chaining to adjacent targets if present.

cards.name: Frost Nova
cards.description: 6 frost + freeze for 3 turns. Time stops for them.

cards.name: Arc Storm
cards.description: 6 storm + drain 2 enemy energy. The storm has a memory.

cards.name: Second Wind
cards.description: +6 HP + restore 1 energy. One more round.

cards.name: Void Strike
cards.description: 12 damage. Costs 2 battery. No suit — ignores RPS.

cards.name: Life Ward
cards.description: 3 defense. A gentle ward of living energy.

cards.name: Blood Barrier
cards.description: Pay 2 HP → 6 defense + regen 1. Your blood hardens into a shield.

cards.name: Vital Surge
cards.description: Pay 1 HP → restore 4 HP and draw 1. Adrenaline focus.

cards.name: Heartblood Thorns
cards.description: Pay 3 HP → 5 defense + reflect 2. Thorns grow from your wounds.

cards.name: Martyr's Embrace
cards.description: Pay 4 HP → 10 defense + regen 2. Embrace the pain, outlast.

cards.name: Crimson Counter
cards.description: Pay 2 HP → 4 defense + 4 damage. Brace and strike.

cards.name: Transfusion
cards.description: Heal 2 HP. Enemy bleeds 1. Take theirs, keep yours.

cards.name: Final Stand
cards.description: Pay 5 HP → 15 defense + regen 3 + reflect 2. Your last heartbeat is a fortress.

cards.name: Static Field
cards.description: 1 energy → 3 defense + shock 1. Zap anything that gets close.

cards.name: Energy Shield
cards.description: 2 energy → 7 defense. Pure energy barrier, no frills.

cards.name: Pulse Guard
cards.description: 1 energy → 4 defense + draw 1. Scan, guard, adapt.

cards.name: Neural Brace
cards.description: 2 energy → 5 defense + stun 2. Lock their brain, lock their attack.

cards.name: Feedback Loop
cards.description: 2 energy → 6 defense + reflect 2 + shock 1. Attack me? Feel it twice.

cards.name: EMP Dome
cards.description: 3 energy → 12 defense + shock 3 + stun 1. Everything stops.

cards.name: Countershock
cards.description: 1 energy → 3 defense + 3 damage. Block and counterpunch.

cards.name: Tempered Plate
cards.description: 1 battery → 8 defense. Forge-hardened plating.

cards.name: Slag Armor
cards.description: 1 battery → 6 defense + burn 2. Molten metal clings to whoever strikes you.

cards.name: Forge Brace
cards.description: 1 battery → 4 defense + 3 damage. Hammer meets shield.

cards.name: Crucible Shell
cards.description: 2 battery → 14 defense + burn 2 + regen 1. The furnace protects its master.

cards.name: Venom Drip
cards.description: 2 damage + poison 2. Slow death, guaranteed.

cards.name: Tangle Root
cards.description: Root 2 + 2 defense. Vines snare and shield.

cards.name: Serrated Edge
cards.description: 3 damage + bleed 2. Jagged wounds don't close.

cards.name: Corrosive Splash
cards.description: 3 damage + poison 2 + burn 1. Acid eats through everything.

cards.name: Briar Trap
cards.description: 4 defense + root 2 + bleed 1. Step on this. I dare you.

cards.name: Toxic Cloud
cards.description: Poison 3 + root 1. Choking fumes pin them in place.

cards.name: Hemorrhage
cards.description: Pay 2 HP → 5 damage + bleed 3. Spill your blood to spill theirs.

cards.name: Constrict
cards.description: 2 damage + root 2 + stun 1. Tentacles hold. You don't.

cards.name: Battery Pack
cards.description: +2 battery. Standard recharge cell.

cards.name: Power Cell
cards.description: +1 battery, +1 energy. Dual-charge capacitor.

cards.name: Overcharge
cards.description: Spend 1 energy → +3 battery. Convert power to charge.

cards.name: Salvage Core
cards.description: Spend 2 HP → +3 battery. Rip wiring from your own flesh.

cards.name: Adrenaline Surge
cards.description: Spend 2 HP → +3 energy. Pain fuels focus.

cards.name: Quick Reload
cards.description: +1 energy + draw 1. Check your pockets.

cards.name: Coffee Break
cards.description: Spend 1 battery → +3 energy. Heat up a quick brew.

cards.name: Medical Kit
cards.description: Spend 2 energy → +6 HP. Field surgery.

cards.name: Stim Pack
cards.description: Spend 1 battery → +4 HP. Automated med-injector.

cards.name: Rations
cards.description: Spend 1 energy → +3 HP, +1 energy back. A quick meal.

cards.name: EMP Blast
cards.description: 3 battery → 8 damage + stun 2. Fry everything nearby.

cards.name: System Crash
cards.description: 2 battery → 5 damage + burn 2. Overheat their circuits.

cards.name: Smoke Screen
cards.description: 1 battery → 4 defense + stealth 2. Vanish in the haze.

cards.name: Grenade
cards.description: 2 energy → 6 damage. Pull pin, throw, duck.

cards.name: Explosive Shot
cards.description: 3 energy → 8 damage. One shot, big boom.

cards.name: Execute
cards.description: 3 energy → 10 damage. Make it count.

cards.name: Thermal Scan
cards.description: 1 battery → 3 damage + expose 2. Nowhere to hide.

cards.name: Jammer
cards.description: 2 battery → 3 defense + disrupt 2. Scramble their signals.

cards.name: Ghost Protocol
cards.description: 2 battery → 5 defense + stealth 3. You were never here.

cards.name: Predator Focus
cards.description: 2 energy → 4 damage + accuracy 2. Lock on.

cards.name: Blood Strike
cards.description: 3 HP → 7 damage. Your blood, their problem.

cards.name: Last Stand
cards.description: 4 HP → 8 defense + invulnerable 1. Not today.

cards.name: Panic Dodge
cards.description: 2 HP → 5 defense. Stumble out of the way, bleeding.

cards.name: Berserker Rage
cards.description: 3 HP → 5 damage + frenzy 2. Rage is a resource.

cards.name: Charged Shot
cards.description: 1 battery → 4 damage + draw 1. Efficient ordnance.

cards.name: Chain Lightning
cards.description: 2 energy → 6 damage + 1 battery. Lightning feeds the grid.

cards.name: Virus
cards.description: 2 energy → 2 damage + poison 3. Slow death.

cards.name: Fragment Shower
cards.description: 2 battery → 3 damage + 3 defense. Shrapnel shield.

cards.name: Incendiary
cards.description: 2 energy → 4 damage + burn 3. Light 'em up.

cards.name: Cryo Trap
cards.description: 1 battery → 3 defense + freeze 2. Ice cage.
